hyperedges.label: CV Tailoring Pipeline: Parsed CV + JD Analysis → Tailored CV + Cover Letter
Web UI Data Flow: server.py + config.json + jd_analysis.json → Dashboard Pages
Job Search Pipeline: LinkedIn MCP + Stepstone MCP → search_history.json
Tailored CV + Cover Letter + Changes per Application
Candidate Core Differentiating Skills (PL-300, Customer Journey, Cohort Analysis)
Kinetic Archive Design System Applied Across All UI Pages
Zenith Deutschland Application Bundle (CV Draft + Changes + Cover Letter)
CV Groups Mapped to Source PDF Files

nodes.label: 检查 theme-factory skill 是否已安装。
nodes.norm_label: 检查 theme-factory skill 是否已安装。

nodes.label: Launch uvx linkedin-scraper-mcp as a subprocess, send an MCP initialize     mess
nodes.norm_label: launch uvx linkedin-scraper-mcp as a subprocess, send an mcp initialize     mess

nodes.label: Spawn uvx linkedin-scraper-mcp briefly to trigger package download/cache,     th
nodes.norm_label: spawn uvx linkedin-scraper-mcp briefly to trigger package download/cache,     th

nodes.label: Verify that uvx linkedin-scraper-mcp is reachable via MCP initialize.     On fir
nodes.norm_label: verify that uvx linkedin-scraper-mcp is reachable via mcp initialize.     on fir

nodes.norm_label: http get to stepstone mcp server to verify it is running.     uses stepstone.ser

nodes.norm_label: 尝试从 theme-factory skill 加载主题定义。     theme-factory 在 skill.md 中描述主题名称和样式参数。     如

nodes.norm_label: 合并 theme-factory 主题和内建主题(theme-factory 优先)。

nodes.label: 解析主题名称，返回 (css_string, theme_dict)。     优先级：theme-factory CSS 文件 > theme-factory
nodes.norm_label: 解析主题名称,返回 (css_string, theme_dict)。     优先级:theme-factory css 文件 > theme-factory

nodes.label: Strip <script>/<style> tags and on* event attributes to prevent injection.
nodes.norm_label: strip <script>/<style> tags and on* event attributes to prevent injection.

nodes.label: 扫描 output/*/jd_analysis.json，返回所有成功解析的记录列表。
nodes.norm_label: 扫描 output/*/jd_analysis.json,返回所有成功解析的记录列表。

nodes.label: Dedup by (company, title) case-insensitively across sources.     When the same j
nodes.norm_label: dedup by (company, title) case-insensitively across sources.     when the same j

nodes.label: 从文件夹名称动态提取 group-id（取首个下划线前的 group- 前缀）。
nodes.norm_label: 从文件夹名称动态提取 group-id(取首个下划线前的 group- 前缀)。

nodes.label: 将列表格式化为分号分隔字符串，超出 max_items 时追加 +N。
nodes.norm_label: 将列表格式化为分号分隔字符串,超出 max_items 时追加 +n。

nodes.label: 根据记录列表生成 Markdown 汇总表（列顺序按 Orchestrator.md 规范）。
nodes.norm_label: 根据记录列表生成 markdown 汇总表(列顺序按 orchestrator.md 规范)。

nodes.label: Send a JSON-RPC message and read a matching response.
nodes.norm_label: send a json-rpc message and read a matching response.

nodes.norm_label: launch linkedin-scraper-mcp, perform initialize handshake,     call search_jobs

nodes.label: Parse a job_details section; returns (title, company, location).
nodes.norm_label: parse a job_details section; returns (title, company, location).

nodes.label: Parse the job_posting section text into structured fields.
nodes.norm_label: parse the job_posting section text into structured fields.

nodes.norm_label: fetch details for a batch of job_ids. returns {job_id: parsed_dict}.

nodes.norm_label: return false if company looks like a ui artifact or description is too short.

nodes.norm_label: parse mcp get_job_details result into a job dict.

nodes.label: 获取一批 job_ids 的详情，复用单个 MCP 进程。     噪音公司名或空描述时自动重试一次；仍失败则标记 _needs_refetch=True。
nodes.norm_label: 获取一批 job_ids 的详情,复用单个 mcp 进程。     噪音公司名或空描述时自动重试一次;仍失败则标记 _needs_refetch=true。

nodes.label: Generate stable ID: st_ + first 16 hex chars of SHA256(url).     16 hex = 64-bit
nodes.norm_label: generate stable id: st_ + first 16 hex chars of sha256(url).     16 hex = 64-bit

nodes.label: Parse search_jobs text response → (session_id, job_count, job_list).     Handles
nodes.norm_label: parse search_jobs text response → (session_id, job_count, job_list).     handles

nodes.norm_label: parse get_job_details text response into structured fields.     handles new emoj

nodes.label: Open one SSE session, search all keywords for a group at one zip_code,     then
nodes.norm_label: open one sse session, search all keywords for a group at one zip_code,     then

nodes.label: Run searches for all groups × zip_codes sequentially.
nodes.norm_label: run searches for all groups × zip_codes sequentially.

nodes.label: 生成今天的下一个 batch_id，格式：YYYYMMDD_NNN。
nodes.norm_label: 生成今天的下一个 batch_id,格式:yyyymmdd_nnn。

nodes.label: 返回该批次原始结果文件的路径（优先 output/temp/，向后兼容 output/）。
nodes.norm_label: 返回该批次原始结果文件的路径(优先 output/temp/,向后兼容 output/)。

nodes.label: 展平所有 group 的 primary + job_family 关键词（EN + DE），保序去重。
nodes.norm_label: 展平所有 group 的 primary + job_family 关键词(en + de),保序去重。

nodes.label: 返回 {keyword: offset}。      同天多批次：offset = 该词在当天所有已有批次中累计 fetched 数。     跨天：offse
nodes.norm_label: 返回 {keyword: offset}。      同天多批次:offset = 该词在当天所有已有批次中累计 fetched 数。     跨天:offse
